message:
The ground beneath the oak tree
seems to be disturbed.
You dig and find a small blade.
You found a blade under the great oak?

This is a druids blade.
It's used to harvest herbs.

Its owner might have buried it
so that the goblins wouldn't find it.
I fear for the worst.

If you have time, would you carry that blade
to the glade in the deep forest?

You look up to the night sky
to see a silvery crescent moon

The druids are all gone,
you can feel it.
The dark wolves have slain them.
Noone can live in these cursed woods anymore.

Knowledge flood over you.
It imparts you the power
to heal wounds.
